# UX Checklist: Cache Frequently Requested Computations

**Purpose**: Validate any cache visibility surfaces in UI.
**Created**: 2026-03-11
**Feature**: `specs/029-cache-computations/spec.md`

**Note**: This checklist is generated by the `/prompts:speckit.checklist` workflow.

## Debug Visibility

- [ ] CHK-UX-001 Cache hit/miss indicator is visible in debug panel (if enabled). Note: Not necessary for core spec; UI optional per UC-29.
- [ ] CHK-UX-002 Correlation ID is visible alongside cache status. Note: Not necessary for core spec; UI optional per UC-29.

## Consistency & Accessibility

- [ ] CHK-UX-003 Labels align with shared naming conventions ("Cache", "Cache hit", "Cache miss"). Note: Not necessary for core spec; UI optional per UC-29.
- [ ] CHK-UX-004 Basic accessibility pass (keyboard navigation + contrast) is part of UX gate. Note: Not necessary for core spec; no UI surface required.
